description_long: This house is a single-story, modern residential building set within a rectangular plot surrounded by lush green lawns and mature trees. The structure features a flat roof and a geometric layout, with multiple sections distinguished by varying roof heights and colored panels in shades of red, beige, and blue. Large windows and glass doors are visible, providing ample natural light and a connection to the outdoor spaces. The property is bordered by a low wall or fence, and the front yard is open and spacious, ideal for landscaping or recreational use. The house appears to have a private backyard area, partially enclosed by trees, offering privacy and shade. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, colorful exterior panels, and large windows, set in a landscaped plot with trees and lawns. The design is minimalist, with geometric forms and a spacious yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, open lawn, and colorful facade panels framed by trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, flat roof sections, and more private outdoor space.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the length of the house, window arrangements, and the boundary wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the geometric roof layout and additional tree coverage.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements, set back from an open lawn
